name: trellis2-gguf
notes_low: Experimental Docker support. Downloads Q4 512 GGUF shape/texture/refiner models and shared Trellis2 decoders/encoders.
notes_high: Experimental Docker support. Downloads Q8 1024 GGUF shape/texture/refiner models and shared Trellis2 decoders/encoders.
description: Trellis2 GGUF image-to-3D workflows using compressed model variants.
